title: Bee Removal in Gravesend, Brooklyn | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Gravesend, Brooklyn. Safe, humane bee hive removal from homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for $350-$550 service!
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides expert bee removal services throughout Gravesend, Brooklyn, protecting homes and businesses from unwanted bee colonies. Our licensed technicians safely remove bee hives from residential properties, commercial buildings, and multi-family units common throughout this South Brooklyn neighborhood. We offer humane, effective bee removal with pricing between $350-$550 depending on hive location and size.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Gravesend residents, we understand the unique challenges posed by bee infestations in this densely populated Brooklyn neighborhood. Our team responds quickly, uses safe removal methods that protect your family and property, and offers competitive flat-rate pricing with no hidden fees.
localContext: Gravesend's mix of single-family homes, brick row houses, and older apartment buildings near Avenue U and Kings Highway often attract bees seeking shelter in eaves, chimneys, and wall voids. The tree-lined streets and proximity to parks like Gravesend Park create ideal conditions for seasonal bee activity, making professional removal services essential for homeowners and property managers.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Gravesend?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal services in Gravesend range from $350 to $550 depending on the hive's size, location, and accessibility. We provide upfront pricing after a brief assessment and never charge hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a bee hive in Gravesend?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day bee removal services throughout Gravesend, Brooklyn. Most bee hive removals are completed within 1-2 hours, though larger or hard-to-reach colonies may require additional time.

faqs.question: Is bee removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use professional-grade equipment and proven techniques to safely remove bee colonies without harming your family, pets, or property. Our technicians are fully licensed and trained in safe bee removal protocols.

faqs.question: Do you remove bee hives from walls and attics in Gravesend homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we specialize in removing bee hives from all locations including walls, attics, chimneys, soffits, and crawl spaces common in Gravesend's residential properties. We also repair entry points to prevent future infestations.
